case_title: JOHN R HARRIS ET AL VS. GIULIETTA OCTAVIO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY HARRIS, JOHN R HARRIS, KIM OCTAVIO, GIULIETTA (OWNER & INDIVIDUAL )

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OCTAVIO, GIULIETTA (OWNER & INDIVIDUAL ) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HARRIS, JOHN R HARRIS, KIM DEFENDANT DID NOT STATE A LEGAL CLAIM FROM WHICH LIABILITY CAN BE FOUND AGAINST PLAINTIFFS, OR BY WHICH DEFENDANT SHOULD BE COMPENSATED BY PLAINTIFFS.
